title: Forward reference when allowForwardReferences is false (parser MAY reject)
description: when allowForwardReferences is false, an Order record references a User that is defined later in the data section (forward reference). The spec states parsers MAY reject forward references when allowForwardReferences is false. This test is marked parser_dependent: true â€” parsers that reject forward references must return E009; parsers that support them may return success=true.
